subject: Urgent: double-charged on my invoice
body: I was billed twice this month for the same subscription. This is blocking our budget approvals and needs to be fixed immediately.

subject: Login error when accessing dashboard
body: Our agents see a generic error when trying to log in to the dashboard. It started after yesterday's deploy.

subject: Feature request: custom ticket views
body: We would like to create saved views for VIP customers and high value accounts. Is this possible?

subject: Minor typo on pricing page
body: There's a small spelling mistake on the pricing page footer. Not urgent, just wanted to flag it.
